name: chr1_1q12_pericentric_heterochromatin
description: 1q12 pericentric heterochromatin block, one of the largest constitutive heterochromatin regions in the human genome. Composed predominantly of classical satellite II/III tandem repeats; site of recurrent inversions and ICF-syndrome decondensation.

architecture.internal_structure: Megabase-scale arrays of HSat2 (5 bp) and HSat3 (5 bp) classical satellites; flanked by mixed SDs; assembly remains incomplete in GRCh38 (gap), fully resolved in CHM13.
